atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind's base, components, utilities, or variants styles.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Applies existing utility classes to custom CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Places custom styles in Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Specifies the Tailwind config file for this stylesheet.
